repeated_questions.question: Derive an expression for entropy change of an ideal gas. Explain entropy change for isothermal process.
Write short notes on refrigeration cycle (vapour compression refrigeration cycle).
Derive an expression for the efficiency of an ideal Rankine cycle with P-v and T-s diagrams.
Derive an expression for the efficiency of an ideal Brayton cycle.
Starting from steady flow energy equation (SFEE), derive equations for turbine and nozzle stating necessary assumptions.
Derive the expression for conduction heat transfer rate through a hollow cylinder using Fourier's law.
Find the heat transfer through the composite wall. (Problems involving multi-layer walls with parallel and series sections.)
Determine the boundary work / work done during a polytropic or given process from a P-V relationship.
State and prove the Clausius Theorem / Show that violation of Kelvin-Planck statement leads to violation of Clausius statement.
repeated_questions.topic: Second Law — Clausius Theorem / KP and Clausius Equivalence

repeated_questions.question: Draw with neat labelling the P-V (or T-v) diagram of water and describe it.
repeated_questions.topic: Pure Substance — P-V / T-v Diagram of Water

repeated_questions.question: A vessel contains liquid water and water vapor mixture in equilibrium. Calculate mass/volume of liquid and vapor.
Steam enters a nozzle and leaves at different conditions while losing heat. Determine the exit velocity and flow area.
An air standard Diesel cycle problem — determine efficiency, cut-off ratio, pressures and temperatures at each state.
An air standard Otto cycle problem — determine efficiency, pressures/temperatures at end of each process, mean effective pressure.
Explain the working principle of Rankine Cycle with P-v and T-s diagram / explain how its efficiency can be increased.
repeated_questions.topic: Thermodynamic Cycles — Rankine Cycle Working Principle

repeated_questions.question: Derive an expression for the overall heat transfer coefficient for a plane wall / composite wall separating two fluid media.
repeated_questions.topic: Heat Transfer — Overall Heat Transfer Coefficient

repeated_questions.question: A furnace wall consists of multiple layers (brick, insulation, plaster). Calculate heat loss per unit area and interface temperatures.
Briefly explain the working principle of heat pump and refrigerator with schematic diagrams. Derive the relationship for COP between heat pump and refrigerator.
repeated_questions.topic: Second Law — Heat Pump and Refrigerator / COP

repeated_questions.question: What are the differences between Otto cycle and Diesel cycle?
repeated_questions.topic: Thermodynamic Cycles — Otto vs Diesel Comparison

repeated_questions.question: Derive an expression for change in entropy of an ideal gas for a polytropic process.
Define thermodynamic system and explain its types. Define thermodynamic property and its types.
What is steady state flow process? Derive SFEE / use general energy equation for adiabatic compressor / throttling device.
repeated_questions.topic: First Law — SFEE / Steady State Flow

repeated_questions.question: A steam pipe covered with two layers of insulation — find heat loss per meter length and percentage decrease compared to single layer.

repeated_questions.question: Define specific heat. Why does a gas have two specific heats (Cp and Cv)? Derive the relationship between them.
repeated_questions.topic: Basic Concepts — Specific Heats, Cp and Cv Relation

repeated_questions.question: State the second law of thermodynamics (Kelvin-Planck and Clausius statements). What are the limitations of the first law?

repeated_questions.question: Explain the mechanism of forced and free (natural) convection with appropriate examples.

Differentiate between spark-ignition (SI) and compression-ignition (CI) engines.
